meta.title: Windows Thick-Client Security Test Plan
meta.note: TC01-TC40 are the imported 40-case manual methodology. TC41+ ([Extended]) cover additional TCPK detection families that the original 40 cases did not reference (deserialization, XXE, dangerous call sites, Electron, WCF, zip-slip, reflection, Java bundles, endpoint/DNS disclosure, trust-store, dev artifacts, env secrets, RPC, App Paths/shim) so the sheet reflects TCPK's fuller coverage. TCPK auto-correlates findings to each case to produce an Auto Status; the tester sets the final Result (PASS/FAIL). 'rule' is a case-insensitive regex matched against finding RuleId. coverage: AUTO = TCPK flags the core static condition; PARTIAL = TCPK flags part, rest is manual; GAP = no detector (manual). A NO-FINDINGS auto-status is NOT a pass -- confirm manually. Even with TC41+, this is NOT TCPK's complete check catalogue (see docs/CHECKS.md and the Findings sheet); recon/internal families (file-snapshot, loaded-modules, GUI/window/handle enumeration) are intentionally not checklist cases.
meta.manual_disclaimer: This checklist is a MANUAL methodology. No case is fully automated end-to-end; every Result must be confirmed by the tester.

cases.name: Secure Storage encryption & key management
cases.manual: Decompile ProtectedData.Protect scope (CurrentUser vs LocalMachine); cross-user decrypt test; uninstall cleanup.

cases.name: Authentication bypass & session management
cases.manual: Burp: strip/forge token, tamper claims, replay expired, brute-force, MFA server-side check.

cases.name: Preferences API client-side authorization bypass
cases.manual: Edit the flag, relaunch, confirm access; proxy API to check server re-validation.

cases.name: WebView JavaScript injection & XSS
cases.manual: Inject script payloads, test file:// access, inspect CSP, attach DevTools.

cases.name: XAML injection & ObjectDataProvider RCE
cases.manual: Decompile the call site; if XAML/target is external, craft an ObjectDataProvider payload and prove exec.

cases.name: NuGet / dependency vulnerability scanning
cases.manual: Verify embedded build version; check exploit availability.

cases.name: Code signing & certificate verification
cases.manual: Tamper a byte; confirm Windows blocks/warns; review issuing CA.

cases.name: Anti-tampering & integrity checks
cases.manual: Hex-edit a check and run; swap a DLL; attach x64dbg.

cases.name: HttpClient SSL/TLS configuration
cases.manual: Burp/mitmproxy: confirm the client accepts a rogue certificate.

cases.name: Platform-specific code (P/Invoke, COM interop)
cases.manual: Fuzz native entry points; review privilege needs.

cases.name: Shell navigation / deep-link security
cases.manual: Navigate directly to sensitive routes; inject deep-link params.

cases.name: Dependency Injection security
cases.manual: Review DI registrations/lifetimes in a decompiler; memory-profile for secrets in singletons.

cases.name: Custom handlers security
cases.manual: Review each handler, fuzz native-view inputs, check lifecycle.

cases.name: Configuration security (appsettings.json)
cases.manual: Review env-var usage; test config injection.

cases.name: Assembly version & update-check security
cases.manual: Burp Match&Replace: serve an unsigned/older package.

cases.name: Logging & debug information leakage
cases.manual: Exercise the app; trigger debug endpoints.

cases.name: Resource file security
cases.manual: Resource Hacker review; confirm the secret is live.

cases.name: Exception handling & error messages
cases.manual: Deliberately trigger errors; inspect messages for stack traces / sensitive data.

cases.name: Clipboard & data-sharing security
cases.manual: Monitor clipboard at runtime; confirm sensitive data + clearing.

cases.name: Memory dump analysis
cases.manual: WinDbg dump + strings/Volatility triage (needs -EnableDeepRuntime + admin).

cases.name: Windows DPAPI master-key extraction
cases.manual: mimikatz sekurlsa::dpapi; PowerShell Unprotect as another user.

cases.name: Windows Registry sensitive-data storage
cases.manual: Change isPremium/role; relaunch; check persistence + server validation.

cases.name: Windows Credential Manager stored credentials
cases.manual: Cross-user access test; cleanup-on-uninstall; LaZagne/mimikatz.

cases.name: DLL hijacking (search-order exploitation)
cases.manual: Plant a proof DLL in a search path and launch.

cases.name: UAC bypass / privilege escalation
cases.manual: Execute the bypass technique (Fodhelper / auto-elevate / COM elevation) and observe.

cases.name: Windows Defender exclusion abuse
cases.manual: Drop EICAR into the path; verify no detection; review consent.

cases.name: MSIX package security analysis
cases.manual: Exercise protocol handlers / file associations.

cases.name: Windows Event Log analysis
cases.manual: TCPK does NOT read the Application/Security event logs: use wevtutil/Get-WinEvent and grep for secrets.

cases.name: Process injection detection
cases.manual: Attempt injection; VMMap RWX scan.

cases.name: Windows Firewall rule security
cases.manual: nmap from another host; uninstall-cleanup check.

cases.name: Named pipe security
cases.manual: Connect as low-priv user; test impersonation; sniff data.

cases.name: COM object security
cases.manual: Test HKCU-shadow CLSID hijack; activate as standard user; AppID security descriptor review.

cases.name: Windows service security
cases.manual: Exploit writable binary / unquoted path to run as SYSTEM.

cases.name: Task Scheduler security
cases.manual: Modify the action target and trigger; review trigger abuse.

cases.name: WMI security assessment
cases.manual: Namespace ACL review; standard-user create-subscription test.

cases.name: Windows update mechanism
cases.manual: Serve a modified/older package via proxy; test cert pinning.

cases.name: ETW (event tracing) security
cases.manual: logman capture a trace; inspect events for credentials/PII.

cases.name: Windows PE analysis (mitigations)
cases.manual: ROP-gadget count; stack-cookie / oversized-input fuzz.

cases.name: Shared memory security
cases.manual: WinObj DACL inspection; WinDbg read the section; anonymous-access test.

cases.name: Driver / kernel component security
cases.manual: WHQL check; Driver Verifier; NVD/CISA-KEV lookup of driver name+version (BYOVD).

cases.name: [Extended] Insecure deserialization (RCE)
cases.manual: Decompile the Deserialize call site; confirm untrusted input reaches it with an unsafe binder/resolver (BinaryFormatter, NetDataContractSerializer, TypeNameHandling).

cases.name: [Extended] XML external entity (XXE) injection
cases.manual: Confirm the XML parser processes attacker-supplied input with DTD / external-entity resolution enabled; test file read / SSRF.

cases.name: [Extended] Dangerous API call sites (cmd / SQL / SSRF / path / impersonation)
cases.manual: Mixed CWE class -- decompile each sink; confirm whether external input reaches it unvalidated (command / SQL / LDAP injection, SSRF, path traversal, token impersonation, input/screen capture).

cases.name: [Extended] Electron / Chromium insecure configuration
cases.manual: Check nodeIntegration / contextIsolation / sandbox / webSecurity and remote content loading.

cases.name: [Extended] WCF binding security (cleartext / unauthenticated)
cases.manual: Review shipped WCF config for clear-text transport, None security mode, or disabled client-cert / credential checks.

cases.name: [Extended] Archive extraction path traversal (zip-slip)
cases.manual: Decompile extraction code; confirm entry paths are validated before write (no ../ escape).

cases.name: [Extended] Reflection / dynamic code loading
cases.manual: Confirm Assembly.Load / Activator / Type.GetType targets are not influenced by external input.

cases.name: [Extended] Bundled Java archive secrets / insecure TLS
cases.manual: Crack shipped jar/war/ear; review entries for secrets and trust-all TLS.

cases.name: [Extended] Backend endpoint / DNS / dev-endpoint disclosure
cases.manual: Review extracted URLs/hosts; flag dev/qa/staging endpoints and confirm prod-only config.

cases.name: [Extended] Rogue / installed trust-store certificates
cases.manual: Confirm any app-installed root/intermediate CA is necessary and not a MITM enabler.

cases.name: [Extended] Leftover dev / build artifacts shipped
cases.manual: Confirm debug symbols / source / backups / .git / API specs are not shipped in the release.

cases.name: [Extended] Process environment-variable secrets
cases.manual: Inspect the running process environment for tokens/keys (needs -ProcessName).

cases.name: [Extended] RPC interface surface
cases.manual: Enumerate RPC endpoints/interfaces; confirm authentication and ACLs on exposed methods.

cases.name: [Extended] App Paths / shim-cache persistence & hijack
cases.manual: Review App Paths / shim entries for hijackable or persistence-relevant references.
